mapper.select: /** 통합게시판코멘트 상세 조회 */ SELECT * FROM t_board_comment WHERE IDX=#{idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(IDX),0)+1 IDX FROM t_board_comment
/** 통합게시판코멘트 등록 */ INSERT INTO t_board_comment (IDX,P_IDX,B_IDX,CONTENT,REG_ID,REG_NM,REG_NK,REG_DTIME,MOD_ID,MOD_DTIME,G_IDX,G_ORD,G_LVL,STATUS) VALUES (#{idx},#{pIdx},#{bIdx},#{content},#{regId},#{regNm},#{regNk},#{regDtime},#{modId},#{modDtime},#{idx},#{gOrd},#{gLvl},#{status})
